title: Growmeal
body:
### Functionality
Ever get bored of clicking crops until they grow? Well fear no more, because Growmeal is here for you. With only one click, your plants will sprout to life before your very own eyes...\
This mod is super simple. It adds a single item called "Growmeal" that allows growing plants instantly

### Recipe
![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/peVVaJD.png)

You are allowed to use this mod in any modpack.
